commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cb9ec6f658ed125c91f23a3ea00e10880d749276)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the Anthropic-family OpenAI compatibility wrapper and tests to project custom tool definitions and named choices as OpenAI function payloads, while adjusting allowed_tools lookup.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +2. Total +26 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows normalizeAllowedToolChoice still returns the original custom snapshot, and the PR-head allowed_tools test still expects that custom entry.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to fix the allowed_tools projection and add after-fix proof for that path; this external PR should stay human-gated while real behavior proof is incomplete.

target.title: fix(stream-wrapper): convert Anthropic custom tools to OpenAI function format in bridge
target.body:
## Summary

- **Problem**: The OpenAI↔Anthropic stream-wrapper bridge preserves custom tools as `type:"custom"` — OpenAI rejects this with HTTP 400. Cross-provider failover from Anthropic-family to OpenAI breaks for any tool-using request.
- **Root cause**: Three emission points in the bridge don't convert to `type:"function"`: tool definitions, `allowed_tools` entries, and `tool_choice`.
- **Fix**: Convert custom tools to `{ type:"function", function: { name, description, parameters } }` (projecting `custom.input_schema`). Convert `tool_choice` to function format. Treat custom tools as functions in `allowed_tools` lookup.
- **What did NOT change**: Function-tool projection path unchanged. Non-custom tools unaffected.

Closes #97020

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Gateway (Anthropic→OpenAI stream-wrapper bridge)

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** `createOpenAIAnthropicToolPayloadCompatibilityWrapper` now emits custom tools as `type:"function"`.

**Environment tested:** Node 24.13.1 on Linux, `node --import tsx` calling real production wrapper.

**Steps run after the patch:** Custom tool payload through the compat wrapper, inspected modified payload.

**Evidence after fix:**

```text
=== AFTER BRIDGE ===
tools[0].type: function
tools[0].function.name: shell
tools[0].function.description: Run a shell command.
tools[0].function.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{}}
tool_choice.type: function
tool_choice.function.name: shell

RESULT: PASS - custom tools converted to OpenAI function format
```

**Observed result after the fix:** Custom tools projected to OpenAI-compatible function format. Existing tests: 16/16 passed.

**Not tested:** Live OpenAI API with cross-provider failover from Anthropic-family model using custom tools. Verified via real production wrapper with compat-flagged model.

## Security Impact

- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No
target.author: zoowh
